overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drone camera gliding along the Badlands coastal border wall covered in graffiti, with the futuristic Night City skyline visible across the water. The clip features smooth camera movement through desert terrain, revealing coastal ruins and abandoned structures before panning back to the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert coastal path alongside border wall

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding along the sandy path next to the graffiti-covered wall, approaching a wrecked vehicle

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and topped with chain link fencing
metal security fencing running along the top edge of the concrete wall
abandoned vehicle partially buried in sand at the base of the wall
sparse dry bushes and grasses growing in the sandy terrain
calm body of water stretching to the horizon under clear skies
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth drone movement along a desert coastal path beside a massive graffiti-covered border wall. Sparse vegetation dots the sandy ground while the distant futuristic skyline of Night City is visible across the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert coastal path continuing alongside wall

events.description: wrecked car passes out of view behind the camera as movement continues

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wall line, maintaining steady forward motion through the desert terrain

segments.scene_description: The camera continues gliding forward along the border wall, having passed the wrecked vehicle. The wall now dominates the left side of the frame at closer range, while the sandy path stretches ahead toward the distant city.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal ruins with view of distant metropolis

events.description: camera turns right to reveal extensive coastal ruins and abandoned structures
increased sunlight glare as camera faces more directly toward the water

agents.ego_description: panning across the coastal landscape to survey the ruins and distant city skyline

entered.detail: broken concrete foundations and derelict structures scattered along the shoreline
large abandoned industrial or hotel structures with damaged facades

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to reveal a panoramic view of coastal ruins and derelict buildings scattered along the shoreline. The graffiti wall exits the frame as the focus shifts to the abandoned structures and the glistening water, with the city skyline now positioned to the right.

events.description: camera pans back left to reveal the graffiti-covered border wall again

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep and returning focus to the border wall alignment

entered.detail: the graffiti-covered wall reappears as the camera completes its pan

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera panning back left, bringing the graffiti-covered wall back into view on the left side. The coastal ruins exit the frame as the perspective returns to the original path alignment, with the ocean now visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone movement along a desert coastal border that shifts from a linear path beside a graffiti-covered wall to a panoramic view of shoreline ruins. It begins gliding along a sandy path where a massive, art-strewn wall lines the left and the futuristic skyline of Night City looms across the calm water. As the camera passes a wrecked vehicle, the wall dominates the immediate foreground while the path stretches forward toward the distant city. The perspective then turns right, causing the wall to exit the frame as the view expands to reveal derelict buildings and coastal ruins scattered along the glistening shoreline. Finally, the camera pans back to the left, bringing the graffiti wall back into view and returning to the original path alignment with the ocean now visible on the right.
